evals.name: commit-staged-docs-change
evals.prompt: Commit only the staged documentation changes on main with a detailed message.
evals.expected_output: A commit on main that includes only the staged docs files and uses a detailed Conventional Commits message with a Japanese body.
expectations: The result confirms the current branch is main before committing.
The commit message includes a Conventional Commits subject and a multi-line body.
The skill does not run git add or git push.

evals.name: refuse-non-main-branch
evals.prompt: Commit the staged files with a detailed message while the current branch is feature/parser-cleanup.
evals.expected_output: A refusal that explains the branch is not main and asks the user to switch or confirm a different plan.
expectations: The result refuses to commit when the current branch is not main.
The skill does not switch branches automatically.

evals.name: refuse-empty-stage
evals.prompt: Commit with a detailed message, but there are no staged changes.
evals.expected_output: A refusal that explains nothing is staged and does not add files automatically.
expectations: The result says there are no staged changes to commit.
The skill does not run git add.
